creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please ask around on the questions@ or net@ mailinlists 
(http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions/) for 
initial information. This does not yet sound like a bug or anything that 
we can use to warrant a bugreport or fix it. In case people on the lists 
also think that this is indeed a bug, please also consider updating to 
6-STABLE or -CURRENT to see whether that would resolve the problem 
(instructions can be found on the handbook). Thanks for using FreeBSD 
and taking the time to report this!
